SEARCH
Package model.items.effects

Klasse HealEffect

java.lang.Object
model.items.effects.HealEffect
Alle implementierten Schnittstellen:
Serializable, Effect
public class HealEffect extends Object implements Effect, Serializable
An effect that restores health to a target entity.

When applied, this effect increases the target's health by a fixed amount.

Seit:
2026
Autor:
Bastian Rentzsch
Siehe auch:
  • Serialisierte Form

  • Konstruktorübersicht

    Konstruktoren
    Konstruktor
    Beschreibung
    HealEffect(int amount)
    Creates a new healing effect with the specified amount.

  • Methodenübersicht

    Modifizierer und Typ
    Methode
    Beschreibung
    void
    apply(Entity target)
    Applies this healing effect to the specified entity.

    Von Klasse geerbte Methoden java.lang.Object

  • Konstruktordetails

    • HealEffect

      public HealEffect(int amount)
      Creates a new healing effect with the specified amount.
      Parameter:
      amount - the amount of health restored when applied

  • Methodendetails

    • apply

      public void apply(Entity target)
      Applies this healing effect to the specified entity.
      Angegeben von:
      apply in Schnittstelle Effect
      Parameter:
      target - the entity that will be healed
